params.callData: Encoded function call for the target
params.callValue: Native ETH to send with the call (e.g. LayerZero fee)

params.tokenAddresses: Array of token addresses (address(0) = native ETH)

approveAndCall(address,address,uint256,a.notice: Approve an ERC20 token and call a target contract in one atomic operation.         Used for cross-chain bridge flows (e.g. OFT Adapter: approve + send).

batchTransfer(address[],uint256[]).notice: Execute multiple transfers in one transaction

batchTransferMulti(address[],uint256[],a.notice: Execute multiple transfers with mixed token types
